sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33877" key="e)/llupos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔλλῡπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n33877.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in grief, mournful</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.621a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
